name: abacos-academic-update-system
description: Aplicación documental docente para actualización científica y generación de recursos didácticos con revisión humana.
author: Centro de Estudios Ábacos

scripts.desktop:dev: cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8765/api ABACOS_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 concurrently -k -n WEB,ELECTRON -c red,blue "corepack pnpm --dir apps/web dev" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3000 && node apps/web/node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && electron ."
scripts.desktop:build:web: cross-env DESKTOP_BUILD=1 NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8765/api corepack pnpm --dir apps/web build && node scripts/prepare-electron-standalone.mjs
scripts.desktop:build: node apps/web/node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && corepack pnpm desktop:build:web
scripts.installer:win: node apps/web/node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && corepack pnpm desktop:build:web && electron-builder --win nsis --x64
scripts.installer:mac: node apps/web/node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && corepack pnpm desktop:build:web && electron-builder --mac dmg
